seo.title: Services | HeartLink
seo.description: Explore HeartLink's private matchmaking services for select families.

hero.title: Choose the level of support you need.
hero.description: Some families want to submit a profile. Others want HeartLink to actively search. We guide you to the right option after speaking with you.

tiers.label: 01 · Profile submission
tiers.title: Private Registry
tiers.description: Submit a profile to be considered for selected HeartLink introductions.

tiers.label: 02 · Success based
tiers.title: Success Plan
tiers.description: No upfront registration fee. A success fee applies only if the match is made through HeartLink.

tiers.label: 03 · Active search
tiers.title: Premium Search
tiers.description: For families who want HeartLink to actively search, shortlist and guide the process.

tiers.label: 04 · Highest touch
tiers.title: Private Circle
tiers.description: For select families who need a highly private, wider search with senior-level attention.

protocol.title: Exclusive does not mean complicated.
paragraphs: HeartLink works with a limited number of families so quality stays high.
Acceptance, fees and service level are discussed only after we understand your family and requirements.

closing.quote: Tell us what you are looking for. We will guide you to the right option.
